kind: Python scripts (Selenium scrapers + Drive upload; two Pygame games)
note: Pre-registered BEFORE any recall ran. Each gold_path is the file a returning developer would need opened to answer. isolation=true marks questions whose answer exists ONLY in this repo (used for cross-scope leak checks). Known hazards, recorded up front: backup.py is an earlier near-duplicate of scrape_content_investorplace.py, so those golds may lose ranks to each other; README.md is nearly empty, so trd-08's answer signal is filename-only.

questions.question: Which script logs into InvestorPlace and scrapes the newsletter for stock picks?
Which script pulls the latest articles from four different newsletter sections of the Masters in Trading site?
Where do we ask the AI to extract option strikes and expiration dates from scraped content?
How does the scraper use the article's publication date to name its output files?
Which mini game gives the player an extra life as a bonus while dodging pipes?
Where is the maze game with ghosts, pellets, and a two-minute timer implemented?
Where do we send scraped article text to the AI with a veteran investor persona for analysis?
Which file is the older, simpler backup of the newsletter scraping flow?
Where do the combined logs get saved under the user's Documents folder before upload?
How do gravity and flapping physics work in the bird game?
